# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_CI_TAG_ISSUE: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ISSUE_TITLE}"

before_script:
  - echo "::set-output name=issue_title::$GITLAB_CI_TAG_ISSUE"

.notify: &notify
  notice: |
    Title: ${{env.CI_PIPELINE_ID}}
    Description: Build started for merge request "${{env.CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IDEA}}".
    Issue: "${GITLAB_CI_TAG_ISSUE}"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
  notify: *notify

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project..."
  when: manual
  environment: production
  tags:
    - "${GITLAB_CI_TAG_ISSUE}"
